_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.

experiences.title: Sr. Data Engineer
experiences.description: Architected batch pipelines across AWS Glue, S3, Redshift, and Airflow, standardizing curated financial datasets and cutting downstream report turnaround time by approximately 35% for enterprise analytics users. Prepared RAG pipeline datasets with S3, Glue, Redshift, and vector database metadata, improving retrieval relevance by approximately 25% for a governed LLM workload used by 8 analytics teams. Automated validation workflows with Python, SQL, Lambda, and Step Functions, reducing data inconsistencies by approximately 40% and cutting manual reconciliation effort by 15 hours/week. Configured streaming ingestion through Kinesis, IAM, and Terraform, supporting 500K+ events/day for regulated financial data processing with role-based access controls.

experiences.title: Data Engineer
experiences.description: Engineered healthcare data pipelines with Azure Data Factory, Databricks, ADLS Gen2, and Delta Lake, enabling governed analytics for supply chain and clinical teams across 6 data domains. Optimized Synapse and Azure SQL models with Spark and SQL, improving query performance by approximately 45% and reducing average report load time from 12 to 4 seconds. Integrated batch and streaming workloads with Event Hubs, Databricks, and ADF, reducing data latency from 4 hours to 20 minutes for downstream analytics delivery. Standardized governance controls with Azure Purview, Key Vault, and CI/CD practices, bringing approximately 90% of pipelines under automated lineage tracking for compliant healthcare reporting.

experiences.title: Data Engineer
experiences.description: Delivered Snowflake, Databricks, Airflow, and AWS pipelines for Apple, improving platform reliability to 99.9% uptime across production reporting workflows. Refined Delta Lake, PySpark, and SQL transformations for Apple, improving data quality checks passed by approximately 30% and reducing reusable dataset build time by approximately 25%. Coordinated Kafka, Spark Streaming, REST API, and CDC integrations for Apple, cutting near real-time ingestion latency to under 5 seconds for cross-system data availability. Enhanced Git, CI/CD, Terraform, and monitoring practices for Apple, reducing deployment failures by approximately 35% and mean time to detect issues by approximately 40%.

experiences.title: Associate Data Engineer
experiences.description: Orchestrated GCP data pipelines with BigQuery, Dataflow, Pub/Sub, and Cloud Composer, transforming 10M+ events/day into analytics-ready datasets for reporting teams and decision support systems. Modeled warehouse structures in BigQuery with SQL, dbt, and Cloud Storage, cutting query costs by approximately 30% and improving self-service analytics adoption across 8 business teams. Analyzed product and operational metrics with Looker, BigQuery, and Python, delivering reusable dashboards adopted by 50+ stakeholders, replacing manual weekly reporting. Operationalized Spark and Dataproc workflows with Terraform, IAM, and monitoring standards, improving pipeline reliability to approximately 99% success rate across GCP environments.
